recommendations.title: Sunset Song
recommendations.overview: The daughter of a Scottish farmer comes of age in the early 1900s.

recommendations.title: The Deep Blue Sea
recommendations.overview: The wife of a British Judge is caught in a self-destructive love affair with a Royal Air Force pilot.

recommendations.title: Distant Voices, Still Lives
recommendations.overview: Siblings Maisie and Tony, along with their mother, gather for their sister Eileen's wedding. It is a joyous occasion, but through flashbacks, it becomes clear that the family was not always happy. Their father was physically abusive to his wife and l

recommendations.title: The Long Day Closes
recommendations.overview: Bud is a lonely and quiet boy whose moments of solace occur when he sits in rapture at the local cinema, watching towering and iconic figures on the movie screen. The movies give Bud the strength to get through another day as he deals with his oppres

recommendations.title: Loving Vincent
recommendations.overview: A young man arrives at the last hometown of painter Vincent van Gogh to deliver the troubled artist's final letter and ends up investigating his final days there.

recommendations.title: Enter the Dragon
recommendations.overview: A martial artist agrees to spy on a reclusive crime lord using his invitation to a tournament there as cover.

recommendations.title: The Big Sick

recommendations.title: Paterson
recommendations.overview: A week in the life of Paterson, a poet bus driver, and his wife Laura, a very creative artist, who live in Paterson, New Jersey, hometown of many famous poets and artists.

recommendations.title: The Libertine
recommendations.overview: The story of John Wilmot, a.k.a. the Earl of Rochester, a 17th century poet who famously drank and debauched his way to an early grave, only to earn posthumous critical acclaim for his life's work.

recommendations.title: The Color of Pomegranates
